halt_clause_triggered: Any ambiguity about which occurrences to change vs. preserve

ambiguities.description: Top-level relay says 'apply MM-01 to UMB main.tex (find degree profile (2,2))'. Patch_relay_MM01.md targets P06's pcf_desert_negative_result.tex line 314. Empirical check confirms UMB main.tex contains zero occurrences of '(2,2)' or 'degree profile (2,2)'; the only file in the corpus matching that string in a PCF context is pcf_desert_negative_result.tex line 314.

evidence.p06_pcf_desert_grep_for_other_profile_li: lines 30, 48, 68, 76, 95, 109, 354 — these are (4,3)/(5,3)/(6,3)/general — NOT to be edited

interpretation_options: A. Follow patch_relay_MM01.md verbatim: edit P06 line 314 only, leave UMB untouched.
B. Follow top-level prompt literally: edit UMB main.tex — but no matching string exists, so this would be a no-op.
C. Operator intended A; phrasing of top-level prompt is loose — edit P06 only.
ambiguities.recommendation: C (most consistent with the audit finding which clearly identifies P06 as the file containing the regression, and with the patch_relay file which provides the exact OLD/NEW text).

ambiguities.description: Top-level relay and patch_relay_MM02.md prescribe NEARLY OPPOSITE rename strategies.
ambiguities.top_level_prompt_says: Rename UMB's internal hierarchy to T-arith-{0..3} throughout UMB main.tex (ALL occurrences). Do NOT touch paper #14 or T2B. Add a one-sentence footnote on first occurrence.
ambiguities.patch_relay_MM02_says: Keep UMB's T0..T3 unchanged. Rename #14's 'Tier 0..3' to 'Obstruction Tier O0..O3' throughout paper4_takeuchi_outline.tex. Add a one-paragraph translation table in UMB §1.2 mapping O_i ⊆ T_j inclusions.

blast_radius_analysis.top_level_approach: UMB main.tex contains 21 standalone uses of T0/T1/T2/T3 as labels (lines 105,106,111,112,117,118,131,132,135,142,156,157,170,208,231,232,248,293,297,300,302,303,309) PLUS Conjecture 6 references c_{PSL2Z,(2,1)} and Remark 8. A rename here propagates into Conjecture 6 (which is also being patched by MM-03), the figure tikz at line 170, the §6 status table at line 208, and 4 problem statements in §5. High edit volume; risk of label collisions during the simultaneous MM-03 patch.
blast_radius_analysis.patch_relay_approach: paper4_takeuchi_outline.tex contains ~30 'Tier' references; mechanical search/replace is straightforward. UMB gets one new \begin{remark}...\end{remark} block in §1.2; no rename of existing labels. Lower blast radius. T2B and bibliography untouched.

interpretation_options: A. Follow patch_relay_MM02.md (rename #14 → O0..O3, add translation remark in UMB). Lower blast radius; no interference with simultaneous MM-03 conjecture rewrite.
B. Follow top-level prompt (rename UMB → T-arith-0..3, leave #14 alone). Higher blast radius; UMB tier labels propagate into the Conjecture 6 patch text from MM-03 which currently uses 'tier T2'.
C. Hybrid: rename in BOTH papers to disambiguated labels (T-arith and O), and add the inclusion remark in UMB. Highest editorial cost but eliminates all ambiguity.
ambiguities.recommendation: A (lowest blast radius, preserves Conjecture 6 patch text from MM-03 verbatim, matches the audit's 'inclusion-table' framing).

no_ambiguity: MM-03 — top-level prompt explicitly says 'use the exact replacement text in patch_relay_MM03.md verbatim'; relay file provides exact OLD/NEW LaTeX. No conflict.
next_action_required: papanokechi confirmation on AMB-MM01 (file scope) and AMB-MM02 (rename strategy) before any .tex is edited.
